title: Long Sequence Decoder Network for Mobile Sensing
authors: Not specified in the provided text
affiliation: Not specified in the provided text
abstract: The paper introduces a method for state estimation through time sequence measurements from limited mobile sensors by combining a structured state space sequence (S4D) model with a decoder network, leveraging a novel initialization scheme and long temporal sequences to produce a robust model with improved performance compared to existing methods.

introduction.topic: Ubiquity of sensor technologies across scientific and engineering domains
introduction.fundamental_problem: Approximating the full state space from limited collected data

methodology.approach: Combining a structured state space sequence (S4D) model with a decoder network
methodology.goal: Produce a robust model with improved performance

results.limitations: Traditional techniques fall short when applied to mobile sensors operating in dynamic environments
